plugins.name: coptube
plugins.description: Seven-expert council (process, architect, QA, developer, manager, cyber, ops) plus four reviewers (data, content, code, UI/UX), advisor, knowledge-harvester, and company-intel scraper for copper/brass/cupronickel tube manufacturing and plant automation. Parallel dispatch, cross-talk, live web search, SWOT + pros/cons + protocol-era lens on every answer.
